class.name: SetRecordReliablePdu
class.comment: FastDIS local patch: restore the commented DIS 7 SetRecordReliablePdu class so generation can recover the standard row through the patch layer. Evidence: references/open-dis/DIS7.xml contains the complete class body in a commented block with pduType 64 and the same padding caveat already carried by DIS6.

attribute.name: requiredReliabilityService
attribute.comment: level of reliability service used for this transaction

attribute.name: pad1
attribute.comment: padding. The spec is unclear and contradictory here.

attribute.name: numberOfRecordSets
attribute.comment: Number of record sets in list
